rationale: Educ. Code §25.0021 governs student identification by legal surname in public schools. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 25.0021. USE OF LEGAL SURNAME. In each public school a student must be identified by the student's legal surname as that name appears:
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict exists.
